title: Create Versatile Gearbox
description: A Create addon that adds a versatile gearbox with independently configurable inputs/outputs on all six sides and redstone control.
body:
# Create: Versatile-Gearbox
A Create addon that adds a versatile gearbox with independently configurable inputs/outputs on all six sides and redstone control.

# 机械动力：多功能传动箱
一个机械动力（Create）附属模组，增加了一种多功能的齿轮箱，其六个面均可独立配置输入/输出，并支持红石控制。
